flags.description: Master queue kill switch. Off — all import / export / sample dispatches short-circuit to TRANSFER_QUEUE_DISABLED with 503. Emergency ops during worker fleet incidents.
SendXferJobNotificationJob execution. Off — jobs complete silently; users must poll `GET /jobs/{id}`. Used when a notifications transport is down.
PruneXferArtifactsJob execution. Off — nothing purges. Emergency during retention policy audits.
The 15-minute + login-time stalled sweep. Off — stuck jobs sit until daily prune. Rarely useful; here for completeness.
HasActivityLog on XferJob dual-write to activity_log. Off decouples XferJob transitions from the tenant feed (won't affect the transfer job itself). Emergency during activity ingest storms.
HasAudit on XferJob dual-write to audits. Off decouples XferJob transitions from the audit trail. Very rare — disable only if the audit substrate is quarantined.
Use the compiled EntityRegistry cache. Off — registry is scanned from reflection on every request (slow, useful during registry debugging).
